---
title: ""
toc: false
description: "Courses taught by Christopher D. Johnston at Duke University, including Political Psychology and graduate methods courses."
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      - text: '<link rel="canonical" href="https://cdjohnston.com/teaching.html" />'
---

## Undergraduate Courses at Duke

- [POLSCI 240 / PSY 225: Political Psychology](https://polsci240-site-7ef0ae.pages.oit.duke.edu/)
- [POLSCI 431S / PSY 326S: Reason and Passion in Politics](docs/Reason&Passion_Syllabus.pdf)

## Graduate Courses at Duke

- [POLSCI 630: Basic Regression](https://polsci630-site-f61095.pages.oit.duke.edu/)
- [POLSCI 701: Core in Political Behavior & Identity](docs/Core_Syllabus.pdf)
